summary: Every Monday, compile the week's numbers into a dashboard view of pipeline movement, wins and stalls.

definition.name: Weekly summary reporter
definition.description: Monday-morning report: scout aggregates last week's governed metrics (new deals, stage movement, won/lost, activity volume) and publishes a weekly-summary saved view grounded in the tenant's corpus.

greenlight.note: Report-only playbook; it proposes no sends or CRM writes.
